use_cases: Hero section background for creative and portfolio websites
Decorative 3D scene for landing pages and marketing sites
Interactive art installation and digital experience backgrounds
Ambient visual for streaming overlays and content creation
ai_summary: A generative 3D mountain landscape scene built with Three.js and custom GLSL shaders. Uses Perlin noise algorithms to create undulating terrain with smooth, solid surfaces. Features dynamic lighting and time-based uniforms for potential animation. Renders a sky-blue gradient mountain terrain suitable as an immersive background or hero element.
